Package io.cloudstub.core.spi

Interface CloudStubApiService

All Known Implementing Classes:
CloudStubS3ApiService, CloudStubSecretsManagerApiService, CloudStubSNSApiService, CloudStubSqsApiService
public interface CloudStubApiService
Optional companion to CloudStubService for modules that want to expose API routes under /api/<serviceId>/….

Discovered at startup via ServiceLoader.load(CloudStubApiService.class). Modules that have nothing to expose simply do not implement this interface.

Registered via META-INF/services/io.cloudstub.core.spi.CloudStubApiService.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    registerRoutes(CloudStubApiContext context)
    Called at API server startup.
    String
    serviceId()
    Must match the CloudStubService.serviceId() of the same module.

  • Method Details

    • serviceId

      String serviceId()
      Must match the CloudStubService.serviceId() of the same module.

    • registerRoutes

      void registerRoutes(CloudStubApiContext context)
      Called at API server startup. Register all module-specific routes through context.registrar(); routes are mounted at /api/<serviceId><path>. The same context.stateStore() the module's stubs use is available here, so REST routes can return live data instead of synthetic stubs.
